# Pull request body

## Contract links

- Proposal: <path-or-none>
- Spec: <path-or-none>
- ADR: <path-or-none>
- Plan item: <path-or-none>
- Active goal: <path-or-none>

## Summary

- <what changed>

## Support-tier impact

<none|surface and tier/claim change>

## Policy impact

<none|ledger, exception, workflow, or rule changed>

## Required evidence

- <proof command or artifact>

## Non-goals

- <scope intentionally excluded>

## Claim boundary

<what this PR proves and what it does not prove>

## Rollback

<smallest safe rollback or disablement path>

## Cleanup

- [ ] Generated files are current or intentionally unchanged.
- [ ] No unrelated untracked files are included.
- [ ] Policy ledgers are updated if needed.
- [ ] Support tiers are updated if claims changed.
- [ ] Active goal or plan item is updated if this completes work.
- [ ] Closeout is added if this completes the lane.
